stakeholders.Role: Regulates public transport operators and oversees licensing compliance for all rail and bus services

Source metadata.evidence_original: The Land Transport Authority (LTA) leads the Smart Urban Mobility Reform 2027. LTA regulates public transport operators and oversees licensing compliance for all rail and bus services.
Source metadata.evidence_translated: The Land Transport Authority (LTA) leads the Smart Urban Mobility Reform 2027. LTA regulates public transport operators and oversees licensing compliance for all rail and bus services.

stakeholders.Role: Partners with technology firms for autonomous buses pilot projects

Source metadata.evidence_original: LTA also funds pilot projects for autonomous buses in partnership with technology firms.
Source metadata.evidence_translated: LTA also funds pilot projects for autonomous buses in partnership with technology firms.

stakeholders.Role: Collaborates with Singapore technology companies to develop autonomous buses

Source metadata.evidence_original: 土地交通局（LTA）与新加坡科技公司合作开发无人驾驶巴士项目，但该公司反映测试场地审批流程过长，严重延误了研发进度。
Source metadata.evidence_translated: LTA collaborates with Singapore technology companies to develop autonomous buses, but the company reported that the test site approval process was too long, severely delaying development progress.

stakeholders.Role: Supervises LTA and allocates annual budgetary funding

Source metadata.evidence_original: The Ministry of Transport (MOT) supervises LTA and allocates annual budgetary funding.
Source metadata.evidence_translated: The Ministry of Transport (MOT) supervises LTA and allocates annual budgetary funding.

stakeholders.Role: Competes with private mobility providers for commuter market share

Source metadata.evidence_original: However, SMRT competes with private mobility providers for commuter market share.
Source metadata.evidence_translated: However, SMRT competes with private mobility providers for commuter market share.

stakeholders.Role: Operates major MRT lines under license from LTA

Source metadata.evidence_original: SMRT Corporation operates major MRT lines under license from LTA.
Source metadata.evidence_translated: SMRT Corporation operates major MRT lines under license from LTA.

stakeholders.Role: Collaborates with LTA on first-mile/last-mile pilot programs

Source metadata.evidence_original: Grab Singapore collaborates with LTA on first-mile/last-mile pilot programs
Source metadata.evidence_translated: Grab Singapore collaborates with LTA on first-mile/last-mile pilot programs

stakeholders.Role: Works with LTA to enforce vehicle emissions standards and penalizes non-compliant fleet operators

Source metadata.evidence_original: The National Environment Agency (NEA) works with LTA to enforce vehicle emissions standards and penalizes non-compliant fleet operators.
Source metadata.evidence_translated: The National Environment Agency (NEA) works with LTA to enforce vehicle emissions standards and penalizes non-compliant fleet operators.

stakeholders.Role: Coordinate with LTA on infrastructure upgrades around MRT stations and pedestrian pathways

Source metadata.evidence_original: Town Councils coordinate with LTA on infrastructure upgrades around MRT stations and pedestrian pathways.
Source metadata.evidence_translated: Town Councils coordinate with LTA on infrastructure upgrades around MRT stations and pedestrian pathways.

stakeholders.Role: Advocates for passenger rights and submits policy feedback to MOT

Source metadata.evidence_original: Commuters’ Association of Singapore (CAS) advocates for passenger rights and submits policy feedback to MOT.
Source metadata.evidence_translated: Commuters’ Association of Singapore (CAS) advocates for passenger rights and submits policy feedback to MOT.
